name: NYIT Campus Events
subtitle: NYIT Old Westbury Campus Events App
description: The official NYIT Old Westbury campus events app. RSVP for events, check in via QR code, and stay up to date with campus announcements.

apps.name: NYIT Events
apps.subtitle: NYIT Old Westbury Campus Events
apps.localizedDescription:
The official NYIT Old Westbury campus events app.

• Browse and RSVP for campus events
• Check in via QR code
• Real-time event updates
• Campus map with building locations
• AR wayfinding to event locations
• Event notifications and announcements
• Study groups
• Admin event management

versions.localizedDescription:
v1.8.1 — Polish & accuracy fixes.

• Feed: Today/Tomorrow labels now match the calendar day correctly
• AR wayfinding: compass now points the right way and updates smoothly; distances shown in ft / mi
• Analytics: active-event count now matches the Manage screen (cancelled events no longer double-counted)
• Analytics: removed developer-only hints for a cleaner dashboard
• Event calendar: auto-refreshes on resume and after viewing an event
• Admin: removed 50-event cap so all events are visible

v1.8.0 — Bug fixes and Firebase improvements.

• Fixed room capacity overrides (admin setting now saves and loads correctly)
• Removed campaigns feature
• Fixed login bug that could corrupt user segment data
• Search bar now shows loading spinner while searching
• Tablet navigation haptic feedback
• Stability and performance improvements
v1.7.0 — AR wayfinding, persistent announcement dismissal, dashboard redesign.
v1.3.0 — Always require login, hidden past events, study groups, admin improvements.
